segments.integrated_caption: The video opens in a brightly lit, modern indoor swimming pool, transformed into a game area with numbered orange platforms (1, 2, 3, 4) along the poolside, resembling spring-loaded seats labeled '弹射' (Launch) and '安全' (Safe). Animated figures introduce the game, showing a male '队长' (Team Leader) and three female '等候区' (Waiting Area) participants. A male narrator explains the rules: "任务开始之后，除了队长之外，队员们先要前往等候区等待" (After the task begins, except for the team leader, team members must first go to the waiting area to wait). He continues, "由队长单独选择哪两台座椅会弹射" (The team leader alone chooses which two seats will launch), accompanied by a distinct spring/launch sound effect. "完成选择后，队长根据自己的意愿，依次让队友前来选择座位" (After completing the selection, the team leader, according to their own wishes, successively lets teammates come and choose seats), and "队员全部选完后，剩下的一个座位属于队长" (After all team members have chosen, the remaining seat belongs to the team leader). A dramatic "NO!" sound and musical sting emphasize the consequence, as the narrator states, "不被弹射的队员得一分" (Team members who are not launched get one point), adding that "每个人依次当一次队长" (Everyone takes turns being the team leader once), met with an "Ohhh" from the participants. Real participants, all in black '24K风暴' t-shirts, are then shown, including '孟子义' walking confidently. A close-up reveals a hand placing a '密' (Secret) token. The '队长' instructs, "来吧来吧，所有人就位" (Come on, come on, everyone take your places), followed by "来吧！" (Come on!). A spring/launch sound and a splash indicate the game is in full swing. One of the '24K风暴 team members' (a male voice) then designates, "现在来指定，你要一号背椅弹射" (Now to designate, you want seat number one to launch). Another female team member enthusiastically says, "来吧！" (Come on!), while a male team member adds, "来！" (Come!). The narrator reminds, "等候的成员戴上耳机" (Waiting members put on headphones). A female team member expresses, "好紧张哦" (So nervous). Another female team member asks, "我选三可以吗？" (Can I choose three?), to which the '队长' advises, "以咱们的交情，我建议你选四" (Given our friendship, I suggest you choose four), followed by laughter and a splash. The female team member then asks, "除了四还建议选哪个？" (Besides four, which else do you suggest?), and the '队长' replies, "选二" (Choose two), again followed by laughter and a splash. She then questions, "你是不是二跟四都是弹下去的？" (Are both two and four going to launch?), to which the '队长' reiterates, "我建议你选四跟二" (I suggest you choose four and two). Throughout, the atmosphere is playful and competitive, with on-screen graphics like '+1分' and '好喝', and '安慕希 爆珠酸奶' branding visible, emphasizing the energetic game show vibe. Split-screen close-ups highlight the individual expressions of the '24K风暴 team members'.

segments.integrated_caption: The brightly lit indoor swimming pool area hosts a lively game challenge, with playful, slightly suspenseful background music setting the tone. The '队长' (Team Leader), a male participant in a black t-shirt and shorts, stands observing the setup with arms crossed, exuding a leadership presence. '24K风暴 team members' are actively engaged, with close-ups showing their distinct hairstyles and focused or smiling expressions. The female participant '孟子义', with braided dark hair and a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, walks confidently toward the numbered '弹射座椅' (Launch Seats). She initiates a playful exchange, asking, "我可以相信你吗？" (Can I trust you?), and accusing, "你骗了我很多次了" (You've lied to me many times). A male voice, likely the '队长' or a team member, responds, "大哥，在这个情况下我还会骗你吗？" (Brother, in this situation, would I still lie to you?). Meng Ziyi initially declares, "那我选四了" (Then I choose four), then changes her mind to "我选二吧" (I'll choose two), reacting with "不行，你好吓人呀" (No way, you're so scary!) to an unseen prompt. After a male voice asks "干嘛?" (What?), she states, "我想选三" (I want to choose three). A male '24K风暴 team member' explicitly addresses her by name, "孟子义，你一定要尊重自己内心，别听他，他肯定是让你下去" (Meng Ziyi, you must respect your inner feelings, don't listen to him, he definitely wants you to go down), implying '下去' means being launched from the seat. Another male team member challenges her, "孟子义，你要是能今天要是你能飞，我吃" (Meng Ziyi, if you can fly today, I'll eat), to which she retorts, "你上次也这么讲的，你还没吃呢" (You said that last time too, and you still haven't eaten!), followed by laughter from multiple participants. Meng Ziyi then declares, "我信你了" (I trust you now). The '队长' or host directs, "来，下一位" (Come, next one). A male team member advises, "咱俩的交情，我建议你做四" (Given our friendship, I suggest you choose four), leading to more laughter. Meng Ziyi mentions, "但他让我选二" (But he wants me to choose two), and again questions, "你是不是骗我?" (Are you lying to me?). Another male voice explains, "每个人跟每个人的交情不一样，你知道吗？" (Everyone's relationship with everyone else is different, you know?), followed by more laughter. The team members collectively shout "选三！" (Choose three!), "真三！" (Really three!), encouraging her choice, with one adding, "四肯定飞，肯定飞" (Four will definitely fly, definitely fly), confirming 'fly' means being launched from the '弹射座椅'. After a male voice asks "选完了吗?" (Have you chosen?), Meng Ziyi reveals, "我刚才也想选三的" (I also wanted to choose three just now). The atmosphere is lively, with participants reacting with gestures like clapping and smiling. Decorative balloons, branded banners for '安慕希 爆珠酸奶', and a large pool are visible in the background. On-screen text such as '选择2号' and '选择3号' appears, indicating decision points. A red and white '密 token' is visible on a blue surface, hinting at a strategic element. '等候区 participants' are briefly shown sitting in the background. The camera alternates between wide shots of the poolside setup and close-ups of the participants' reactions, emphasizing the interactive and competitive nature, concluding with a male voice expressing, "好紧张啊，不行，这个" (So nervous, no, this...).

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens to a lively indoor swimming pool setting, where `24K风暴 team members` are seated on numbered orange `弹射座椅 (Launch Seats)`. Amidst the excited chatter and laughter, a playful negotiation unfolds, with a male voice saying, "我跟我换" (I'll swap with you), met by another's firm "我不换" (I won't swap). The `blonde female participant`, wearing her black '24K风暴' t-shirt and white hair accessory, is seen laughing and gesturing animatedly, while the `male participant with dark hair` reacts with surprise and amusement. A male voice, likely the `队长` who stands observing with arms crossed, playfully warns, "告诉你们让你们做死，没人听" (Telling you to make you die, no one listens). The `blonde female participant` then eagerly offers, "我跟你换，我跟你换" (I'll swap with you, I'll swap with you), to which the `male participant with dark hair` responds, "你跟我换？" (You swap with me?). After a moment, he confirms, "我真的跟你换" (I'll really swap with you), but another male voice interjects, "现在没你交声" (Now it's not your turn to speak), followed by more laughter and a playful "我的交情呢哥？" (Where's our friendship, bro?). As the game progresses, voices encourage, "下吧，下吧" (Go down, go down), and the `blonde female participant` exclaims, "来吧!" (Come on!). She then asks for instructions, "是这样吗？手是这样吗？这样扣着膝盖还是平躺？" (Is it like this? Are hands like this? Holding knees like this or lying flat?), receiving guidance to "手抱胸，重心往后" (Hands crossed on chest, center of gravity back). Expressing a mix of confusion and anticipation, she wonders, "所以真的一坐为什么就这样了？" (So why does it become like this as soon as I sit?). The tension builds with the `male participant with dark hair` exclaiming, "好吓人哦！" (So scary!) and "妈!" (Mom!), just before the dynamic launches begin. Loud "WAH!" screams, splashes, and excited shouts fill the air as participants, including the `blonde female participant` jumping off her seat and the `male participant with dark hair` mid-air, are propelled into the pool. The `队长`'s voice is heard confirming, "说没说，你绝对下!" (Didn't I say, you're definitely going down!), amidst the continued laughter and splashes. The segment concludes with the `队长`'s final playful remark, "你们每一个人下，都让你们做死，没有一个人信我" (Every one of you who goes down, I told you you'd die, no one believed me), as the participants regroup, still engaged in the humorous and exciting game by the brightly lit indoor pool.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a male participant in a black t-shirt and a yellow-and-blue towel, leaning casually against a white pillar, reacting with a laugh as he comments on team reputation. A dramatic gong sound then signals a shift to a wide shot of an indoor pool area, brightly lit with a modern, industrial aesthetic, where a game is being set up with four numbered orange '弹射' (Launch) and '安全' (Safe) platforms. An announcer's voice calls out, "Next up, Team Leader!" as the '队长', in a black t-shirt and shorts, observes the game with arms crossed. '孟子义', wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt and a blue towel, interacts with the game setup, asking if "more than two went down," then confidently declares, "I'll choose, I'll choose," expressing trust in someone. She engages in a strategic and playful dialogue with a male participant with dark hair, also in a '24K风暴' t-shirt, who playfully comments on her "good acting" and asks for suggestions on which number to pick. '孟子义' suggests "one," leading to banter about following an "old path," and she exclaims, "Then don't choose that one!" as the blonde female participant, with curly platinum hair, laughs and gestures playfully. The dark-haired male participant then proposes "two," asking if it's "okay," while '孟子义' insists "choosing one is better," dramatically exclaiming, "Wow, this is really acting, oh my god!" He then challenges her to choose between "two and four," to which she responds, "Then I'll choose four." A dramatic whoosh and a distinct "boing" sound effect accompany his final decision, "Then I'll go for four," followed by laughter and '孟子义's' exclamation, "So close!" The male participant with dark hair concludes with a teasing, "Piss you off, piss off," as the energetic and competitive atmosphere of the team-based challenge unfolds, with on-screen graphics like a '密' token indicating game mechanics.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with close-ups of participants reacting with amusement and anticipation, including a male participant with dark, tousled hair and a female participant with braided dark hair in a blue 'RUN' jacket, both smiling and laughing. A female voice, likely the blonde participant, playfully asks, "你那能是好位置吗，你觉得？" (Do you think that's a good spot?), eliciting laughter. The scene transitions to a wide shot of a brightly lit indoor swimming pool area, decorated with balloons and promotional signage for '安慕希爆珠酸奶', where four participants are seated on numbered orange '弹射座椅' (Launch Seats). A male voice, identified as **Fan Chengcheng** (the '队长'), confidently states, "这正合我意" (This is exactly what I want), while another male voice questions the "good spot" given to Fan Chengcheng. Fan Chengcheng then asks, "我是咱俩吧" (It's us two, right?), to which the blonde female participant exclaims, "真巧!" (What a coincidence!). The atmosphere intensifies with game show music as Fan Chengcheng prepares for a challenge, adjusting his position on a launch seat. He performs a dramatic leap, executing a mid-air flip before landing in the pool with a loud splash, met by cheers and excited reactions, including a male voice repeatedly exclaiming, "真是他俩!" (It's really them two!). After resurfacing, Fan Chengcheng is seen in the water, wet and smiling, alongside Meng Ziyi, a female participant in a black t-shirt. The blonde female participant then shouts "安慕希!" (Anmushi!), linking to the poolside branding. In the '等候区' (Waiting Area), four team members in matching black '24K风暴' t-shirts, draped in yellow towels, watch the action, joining in the excited shouts of "下去! 下去!" as the blonde female participant holds a red and white '密' (Secret) token. Fan Chengcheng interacts with her, gesturing toward the pool, while she eagerly says, "我来我来" (I'll do it, I'll do it) and "那我先来吧" (Then I'll go first). Fan Chengcheng playfully protests, "我不要，我不想，我不想选，我不想决定" (I don't want, I don't want to choose, I don't want to decide), before suggesting "剪刀布" (Rock, paper, scissors). The female participant in the blue 'RUN' jacket is heard saying, "我先选三" (I'll choose three first), maintaining the lively and humorous game-show environment.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens in a brightly lit indoor swimming pool, transformed into a vibrant game show set with four numbered orange launch seats labeled '弹射' (Launch) and '安全' (Safe), prominently flanked by large promotional stands for '安慕希爆珠酸奶' (Anmushi Burst Yogurt). Upbeat, energetic background music plays throughout. A blonde female participant, with curly platinum hair and a white hair accessory, energetically interacts with a male participant with dark hair, who is seated on launch seat #2. She playfully gestures, holding a red and white '密' (Secret) token, as the male participant reacts with amusement, speaking in Chinese, "现在" (now), followed by her "可以" (okay) and his "嗯" (hmm). He then adds, "这块可没有哥们儿不哥们儿的说法啊" (There's no such thing as 'bros' or 'not bros' here), eliciting laughter. The scene cuts to a split-screen showing the 24K风暴 team members—two men and two women in matching black '24K风暴' t-shirts—smiling and laughing, with one female participant in a blue 'RUN' jacket also visible, who states in English, "Girl always help girls." The blonde participant then moves to launch seat #1, playfully mimicking a jump, while the male participant with dark hair, now seated on seat #3, watches with a grin. He exclaims "Sister!" and "My sister!" amidst laughter. The blonde participant asks "你的二怎么样?" (How's your two?), to which she replies "还可以" (It's okay). The camera zooms in on the blonde participant’s expressive face as she laughs, then cuts to a close-up of the male participant with dark hair, now wearing white headphones and reacting with surprise. He declares, "我吃四" (I'll choose four), followed by a distinct "boing" sound, and then "你吃吧" (You choose it), accompanied by laughter. The scene shifts back to the poolside, where the blonde participant stands beside the male participant, who is now seated on seat #2 again, as they engage in lighthearted banter. He states, "快姐，我下路是队长" (Sister Kuai, I'm the captain in the bottom lane), and she asks, "你想选几吗？还有一个二" (Do you want to choose a number? There's still a two). He reacts with an "哎呀" (Oh dear) and "啊" (Ah!), followed by another "boing" sound, and she responds "可以" (Okay). The blonde participant then moves to seat #4, where she sits beside the male participant with dark hair, who is now wearing a yellow towel over his head, and they share a moment of playful interaction. He asks, "我可以跟你换吗?" (Can I swap with you?), and after he asks "听什么?" (Listen to what?), she humorously replies, "因为我跟你没有这个交集" (Because you and I have no intersection/connection), leading to more laughter. The camera captures a close-up of the blonde participant laughing, then cuts to a wide shot showing the pool with two participants already in the water—Sheng Ziyi, with braided dark hair, and another male participant—both smiling and reacting to the ongoing game. The blonde participant stands beside the male participant on seat #1, gesturing animatedly, as he states, "我坐四" (I'll sit on four). He then asks, "你跟我换一下吗?" (Will you swap with me?), and she confidently declares, "我救你" (I'll save you). He questions, "真的假的?" (Really?), and then affirms, "我真救你" (I'll really save you), followed by a "boing" sound and laughter. He then explains, "他说他救我一次" (He said he'd save me once), to which she confirms, "对啊" (Yeah). He apologizes, "对不起了姐" (Sorry, sis), and she playfully urges, "那你飞吧，那你飞" (Then you fly, then you fly), followed by another "boing" sound. She then reassures, "我没事，我无所谓，你放，你你" (I'm fine, I don't care, you let, you you...), as the male participant with dark hair continues to laugh, and the poolside branding remains prominent in the background, with a male voice commenting, "他好能演啊" (He's such a good actor!).

segments.integrated_caption: The scene opens with close-ups of Jia Nailiang, the male participant with dark, tousled, damp hair, wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, appearing focused and slightly amused near the poolside. He is heard stating, "对我们亏钱太多了" (We've lost too much money), followed by an English phrase, "Boys, only help a boys." The camera then reveals the indoor pool area with four numbered orange launch seats. The blonde female participant, with platinum blonde curls and a white hair accessory, also in a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, sits on seat 3, laughing and playfully gesturing. She challenges Jia Nailiang, saying, "别信他，贾乃亮，你忘了上次他俩掉下去了" (Don't believe him, Jia Nailiang, you forgot last time they both fell down). Jia Nailiang, standing near seat 1, responds, "站第一吗?" (Stand first?) and "我只当过第三啊" (I've only been third), prompting laughter from the group. He then playfully suggests, "那说后退一步。当个助手。" (Then step back. Be an assistant.) The blonde female participant questions him again, "我可以信你吗，弟弟?" (Can I trust you, little brother?), to which Jia Nailiang replies, "随便选一个吧，都安全。" (Just pick one, they're all safe.) She skeptically asks, "真的都安全吗?" (Are they really all safe?) and declares, "我选二了。" (I chose two.) She reiterates, "我可以信你吗，贾乃亮?" (Can I trust you, Jia Nailiang?), reminding him, "我那把可是让你坐上安全的位置。" (But last time I let you sit in the safe position.) Jia Nailiang, perhaps referring to himself, adds, "你别忘了，贾乃亮现在满脑子就怒火。" (Don't forget, Jia Nailiang is now full of rage), followed by more laughter. He then states, "我选，选安全的。" (I choose, choose the safe one.) The blonde female asks, "我跟他换吗?" (Should I swap with him?), and Jia Nailiang advises, "你就不用换了，姐。三稳你下的。" (You don't need to swap, sis. Three is stable for you to go down.) After a brief, playful exchange about the "stable three," the blonde female participant declares, "我闭麦，我闭麦。我准备好了。" (I'm muting, I'm muting. I'm ready.) Jia Nailiang steps onto seat 1, preparing for a jump. A distinct spring sound is heard, followed by a dramatic leap and a massive splash as he plunges into the pool, captured in slow-motion. The blonde female reacts with surprise and laughter, adjusting her hair accessory, while a female participant in a blue 'RUN' jacket is briefly seen laughing. Loud, exaggerated laughter from multiple participants, including Jia Nailiang, fills the air. In the background, '安慕希爆珠酸奶' and '好喝' branding on milk carton-shaped stands and a '浅水区 1.3m' sign are visible. The lively, comedic atmosphere continues as Jia Nailiang resurfaces, and the blonde female remains seated, still laughing, with other team members observing amusedly.

segments.integrated_caption: The brightly lit indoor swimming pool area sets the scene for a game show-style challenge, as a male voice declares, "今天就是见证的时候" (Today is the time to witness), followed by laughter and a playful "你脸啊" (Your face!). The '队长', a male participant with dark, tousled hair, confidently states, "我做一" (I'll do one), choosing launch seat 1. After being told "请坐" (Please sit), he dramatically leaps with a wide smile, accompanied by a triumphant "Yes!" and a loud splash into the shallow water. The blonde female participant, holding a red '密' token, reacts with surprised laughter and excited "哇!" (Wow!) screams, joined by other '24K风暴 team members' whose collective shouts and laughter fill the air. The '等候区 participants' observe with amusement. A male participant with dark hair exclaims, "不行不行，我今天那么害怕啊" (No, no, I'm so scared today!), followed by laughter and a playful "换一下" (Change it up), as a hand points to a red and white decision board. Another participant is launched with a splash and more excited "Yeah!" and "哇!" shouts. Playful banter continues with "从此咱俩的友谊，够了" (From now on, our friendship is enough). Choices are made, "我选一" (I choose one) and "四" (Four), leading to another dramatic launch, met with prolonged, high-pitched screams and laughter. The male participant with dark hair, who previously expressed fear, exclaims, "又是我！" (It's me again!), followed by more laughter, indicating he's been chosen for another jump. Further choices are heard: "我选二" (I choose two), "那我还是选一吧" (Then I'll still choose one), and a discussion, "三，你觉得可以吗？" (Three, do you think it's okay?) "我觉得可以" (I think it's okay). The segment concludes with a final dramatic sound effect, a splash, and more screams and laughter as another participant is launched, all against the backdrop of prominent '安慕希爆珠酸奶' branding.
